entries.source: We may amend Terms at any time by posting the amended terms on this site. It is your responsibility to review these Terms periodically. Your continued use of the Platform following the posting of revised Terms means that you accept and agree to the changes. You are expected to check this page frequently so you are aware of any changes, as they are binding on you. By continuing to access or use our Service after any revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms. If you do not agree to the new terms, you are no longer authorized to use Service.
entries.value: ଏହି site ଉପରେ amended terms post କରି ଆମେ କୌଣସି ସମୟରେ Terms amend କରିପାରୁ। ଏହି Terms କୁ ସମୟ ସମୟରେ review କରିବା ଆପଣଙ୍କ ଦାୟିତ୍ୱ। Revised Terms post ହେବା ପରେ Platform ବ୍ୟବହାର ଜାରି ରଖିବାର ଅର୍ଥ ଆପଣ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନଗୁଡିକ accept ଓ agree କରୁଛନ୍ତି। ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନଗୁଡିକ ଆପଣଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ binding ଥିବାରୁ ଏହି page ବାରମ୍ବାର check କରିବାକୁ ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ ଆଶା କରାଯାଏ। Revisions ପ୍ରଭାବୀ ହେବା ପରେ Service access କିମ୍ବା use ଜାରି ରଖିଲେ, ଆପଣ revised terms ଦ୍ୱାରା bound ହେବାକୁ agree କରନ୍ତି। ନୂଆ terms ସହ ସମ୍ମତ ନହେଲେ, ଆପଣ Service ବ୍ୟବହାର ପାଇଁ ଆରମ୍ଭରୁ authorized ରହିବେ ନାହିଁ।

entries.source: We may disclose personal information that we collect, or you provide: Disclosure for Law Enforcement: Under certain circumstances, we may be required to disclose your Data if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities. Business Transaction: If our subsidiaries or we are involved in a merger, acquisition or asset sale, your Personal Data may be transferred. Other cases. We may disclose your information also: to our subsidiaries and affiliates; to contractors, service providers, and other third parties we use to support our business; to fulfil the purpose for which you provide it; to include your company’s logo on our website; for any other purpose disclosed by us when you provide the information; with your consent in any other cases; if we believe disclosure is necessary or appropriate to protect the rights, property, or safety of the Company, our customers, or others.
entries.value: ଆମେ ସଂଗ୍ରହ କରୁଥିବା କିମ୍ବା ଆପଣ ଦେଇଥିବା personal information ପ୍ରକାଶ କରିପାରୁ: Law Enforcement ପାଇଁ disclosure: କିଛି ପରିସ୍ଥିତିରେ ଆଇନ ଦ୍ୱାରା ଆବଶ୍ୟକ ହେଲେ କିମ୍ବା public authorities ର valid request ରେ ଆମକୁ ଆପଣଙ୍କ Data disclose କରିବାକୁ ପଡ଼ିପାରେ। Business Transaction: ଆମ subsidiaries କିମ୍ବା ଆମେ merger, acquisition କିମ୍ବା asset sale ରେ ଜଡିତ ହେଲେ, ଆପଣଙ୍କ Personal Data transfer ହୋଇପାରେ। ଅନ୍ୟ ମାମଲା: ଆମ subsidiaries ଓ affiliates; contractors, service providers ଓ ଆମ business support କରୁଥିବା third parties; ଆପଣ ଯେ purpose ପାଇଁ ସୂଚନା ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି ତାହା ପୂରଣ; website ରେ ଆପଣଙ୍କ company logo include କରିବା; ଆପଣ information ଦେବାବେଳେ ଆମେ disclose କରୁଥିବା ଅନ୍ୟ purpose; ଆପଣଙ୍କ consent ସହ ଅନ୍ୟ cases; କିମ୍ବା Company, customers ବା others ଙ୍କ rights, property, safety ସୁରକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ disclosure ଆବଶ୍ୟକ କିମ୍ବା ଉଚିତ ବୋଲି ଆମେ ଭାବିଲେ, ଆମେ ସୂଚନା disclose କରିପାରୁ।

entries.source: We may employ third party companies and individuals to facilitate our Service (“Service Providers”), provide Service on our behalf, perform Service-related services or assist us in analysing how our Service is used. These third parties have access to your Personal Data only to perform these tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.
entries.value: ଆମେ ପାରେ employ ତୃତୀୟ ପକ୍ଷ companies ଓ individuals କୁ facilitate ଆମ Service (“Service ପ୍ରଦାନକାରୀ”), provide Service ଉପରେ ଆମ behalf, perform Service-ସମ୍ବନ୍ଧିତ services କିମ୍ବା assist us ରେ analysing କିପରି ଆମ Service ହେଉଛି used. ଏହିଗୁଡିକ third parties have access କୁ ଆପଣଙ୍କ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ଡାଟା only କୁ perform ଏହିଗୁଡିକ tasks ଉପରେ ଆମ behalf ଓ ହେଉଛି obligated ନୁହେଁ କୁ disclose କିମ୍ବା ବ୍ୟବହାର ଏହା ପାଇଁ any other purpose.

entries.source: We may provide paid products and/or services within Service. In that case, we use third-party services for payment processing (e.g. payment processors). We will not store or collect your payment card details. That information is provided directly to our third-party payment processors whose use of your personal information is governed by their Privacy Policy. These payment processors adhere to the standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by the PCI Security Standards Council, which is a joint effort of brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover. PCI-DSS requirements help ensure the secure handling of payment information.
entries.value: ଆମେ Service ଭିତରେ paid products ଏବଂ/କିମ୍ବା services ଦେଇପାରୁ। ସେହି ମାମଲାରେ payment processing ପାଇଁ ଆମେ third-party services (ଯଥା payment processors) ବ୍ୟବହାର କରୁ। ଆମେ ଆପଣଙ୍କ payment card details store କିମ୍ବା collect କରିବୁ ନାହିଁ। ସେହି ସୂଚନା ସିଧାସଳଖ ଆମ third-party payment processors କୁ ଦିଆଯାଏ, ଯେଉଁମାନଙ୍କ Privacy Policy ଆପଣଙ୍କ personal information ବ୍ୟବହାରକୁ ଶାସନ କରେ। ଏହି payment processors PCI Security Standards Council ଦ୍ୱାରା managed PCI-DSS standards ପାଳନ କରନ୍ତି, ଯାହା Visa, Mastercard, American Express ଓ Discover ପରି brands ର ସଂଯୁକ୍ତ ପ୍ରୟାସ। PCI-DSS requirements payment information ର secure handling ସୁନିଶ୍ଚିତ କରିବାରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରେ।

entries.source: We may terminate or suspend your account and bar access to Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, under our sole discretion, for any reason whatsoever and without limitation, including but not limited to a breach of Terms. If you wish to terminate your account, you may simply discontinue using Service. All provisions of Terms which by their nature should survive termination shall survive termination, including, without limitation, ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity and limitations of liability.
entries.value: ଆମ ସ୍ୱଇଚ୍ଛାନୁସାରେ, କୌଣସି କାରଣରେ ଏବଂ limitation ବିନା, Terms breach ସମେତ, prior notice କିମ୍ବା liability ବିନା ଆମେ ତତ୍କ୍ଷଣାତ୍ ଆପଣଙ୍କ account terminate କିମ୍ବା suspend କରି Service access bar କରିପାରୁ। ଆପଣ account terminate କରିବାକୁ ଚାହିଁଲେ, କେବଳ Service ବ୍ୟବହାର ବନ୍ଦ କରିପାରିବେ। Terms ର ସେମାନେ provisions ଯେଗୁଡିକ ସ୍ୱଭାବତଃ termination ପରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ରହିବା ଉଚିତ, ସେଗୁଡିକ termination ପରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ରହିବ; ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity ଓ limitations of liability ସମେତ।

entries.source: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. We will let you know via email and/or a prominent notice on our Service, prior to the change becoming effective and update “effective date” at the top of this Privacy Policy. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.
entries.value: ଆମେ ସମୟ ସମୟରେ Privacy Policy update କରିପାରୁ। ନୂଆ Privacy Policy ଏହି page ଉପରେ post କରି କୌଣସି changes ବିଷୟରେ ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ notify କରିବୁ। Change ପ୍ରଭାବୀ ହେବା ପୂର୍ବରୁ email ଏବଂ/କିମ୍ବା Service ଉପରେ prominent notice ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ ଜଣାଇପାରୁ ଏବଂ ଏହି Privacy Policy ର “effective date” update କରିବୁ। କୌଣସି ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ ପାଇଁ ଏହି Privacy Policy କୁ ସମୟ ସମୟରେ review କରିବାକୁ ପରାମର୍ଶ ଦିଆଯାଏ। ଏହି page ଉପରେ post ହେଲେ changes ପ୍ରଭାବୀ ହୁଏ।

entries.source: We may use remarketing services to advertise on third party websites to you after you visited our Service. We and our third-party vendors use cookies to inform, optimise and serve ads based on your past visits to our Service.
entries.value: ଆମେ ପାରେ ବ୍ୟବହାର remarketing services କୁ advertise ଉପରେ ତୃତୀୟ ପକ୍ଷ websites କୁ ଆପଣ ପରେ ଆପଣ visited ଆମ Service. ଆମେ ଓ ଆମ ତୃତୀୟ-ପକ୍ଷ vendors ବ୍ୟବହାର cookies କୁ inform, optimise ଓ serve ads based ଉପରେ ଆପଣଙ୍କ past visits କୁ ଆମ Service.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to automate the development process of our Service.

entries.source: We reserve the right to withdraw or amend our Service, and any service or material we provide via Service, in our sole discretion without notice. We will not be liable if for any reason all or any part of Service is unavailable at any time or for any period. From time to time, we may restrict access to some parts of Service, or the entire Service, to users, including registered users.
entries.value: ଆମ sole discretion ରେ, notice ବିନା, ଆମ Service କିମ୍ବା Service ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଦେଇଥିବା କୌଣସି service/material withdraw କିମ୍ବା amend କରିବାର ଅଧିକାର ଆମେ ରଖୁଛୁ। କୌଣସି କାରଣରୁ Service ର ସମସ୍ତ କିମ୍ବା କୌଣସି ଅଂଶ କୌଣସି ସମୟରେ କିମ୍ବା କୌଣସି ଅବଧି ପାଇଁ unavailable ହେଲେ ଆମେ liable ହେବୁ ନାହିଁ। ସମୟ ସମୟରେ registered users ସମେତ users ପାଇଁ Service ର କିଛି ଅଂଶ କିମ୍ବା ସମଗ୍ର Service access restrict କରିପାରୁ।

entries.source: We respect the intellectual property rights of others. It is our policy to respond to any claim that Content posted on Service infringes on the copyright or other intellectual property rights (“Infringement”) of any person or entity. If you are a copyright owner, or authorized on behalf of one, and you believe that the copyrighted work has been copied in a way that constitutes copyright infringement, please submit your claim via email to support@inspir.app, with the subject line: “Copyright Infringement” and include in your claim a detailed description of the alleged Infringement as detailed below, under “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims” You may be held accountable for damages (including costs and attorneys’ fees) for misrepresentation or bad-faith claims on the infringement of any Content found on and/or through Service on your copyright.
entries.value: ଆମେ ଅନ୍ୟମାନଙ୍କ intellectual property rights କୁ ସମ୍ମାନ କରୁ। Service ଉପରେ post ହୋଇଥିବା Content କୌଣସି person କିମ୍ବା entity ର copyright କିମ୍ବା ଅନ୍ୟ intellectual property rights ଉଲ୍ଲଂଘନ (“Infringement”) କରୁଛି ବୋଲି କୌଣସି claim ଆସିଲେ ତାହାକୁ respond କରିବା ଆମ policy। ଆପଣ copyright owner କିମ୍ବା owner ପକ୍ଷରୁ authorized ହେଲେ, ଏବଂ copyrighted work ଏପରି ଭାବେ copy ହୋଇଛି ଯାହା copyright infringement ଗଠନ କରେ ବୋଲି ଭାବୁଥିଲେ, “Copyright Infringement” subject line ସହ support@inspir.app କୁ email ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ claim submit କରନ୍ତୁ ଏବଂ “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims” ଅଧୀନରେ ନିମ୍ନେ ଦିଆଯାଇଥିବା alleged Infringement ର ବିସ୍ତୃତ ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନା ଯୋଡ଼ନ୍ତୁ। Service ଉପରେ କିମ୍ବା Service ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ମିଳୁଥିବା Content ଉପରେ infringement ବିଷୟରେ misrepresentation କିମ୍ବା bad-faith claim ପାଇଁ ଆପଣ damages, costs ଓ attorneys’ fees ସହିତ ଦାୟୀ ହୋଇପାରନ୍ତି।

entries.source: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our Service and we hold certain information. Cookies are files with a small amount of data which may include an anonymous unique identifier. Cookies are sent to your browser from a website and stored on your device. Other tracking technologies are also used such as beacons, tags and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze our Service. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service. Examples of Cookies we use:Session Cookies: We use Session Cookies to operate our Service. Preference Cookies: We use Preference Cookies to remember your preferences and various settings. Security Cookies: We use Security Cookies for security purposes. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies are used to serve you with advertisements that may be relevant to you and your interests.
entries.value: ଆମ Service ର activity track କରିବାକୁ ଆମେ cookies ଓ ସମାନ tracking technologies ବ୍ୟବହାର କରୁ ଏବଂ କିଛି ସୂଚନା ରଖୁ। Cookies ହେଉଛି ଛୋଟ ଡାଟା file, ଯାହାରେ anonymous unique identifier ଥାଇପାରେ। Cookies website ରୁ ଆପଣଙ୍କ browser କୁ ପଠାଯାଇ ଆପଣଙ୍କ device ରେ stored ହୁଏ। Beacons, tags ଓ scripts ପରି ଅନ୍ୟ tracking technologies ମଧ୍ୟ information collect/track କରିବା ଓ Service improve/analyze କରିବା ପାଇଁ ବ୍ୟବହୃତ ହୁଏ। ଆପଣ browser କୁ ସମସ୍ତ cookies refuse କରିବାକୁ କିମ୍ବା cookie ପଠାଯାଉଥିବାବେଳେ ସୂଚନା ଦେବାକୁ କହିପାରିବେ। କିନ୍ତୁ cookies accept ନକଲେ Service ର କିଛି ଅଂଶ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିପାରିବେ ନାହିଁ। ଆମେ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରୁଥିବା Cookies ର ଉଦାହରଣ: Session Cookies: Service operate କରିବାକୁ। Preference Cookies: ଆପଣଙ୍କ preferences ଓ settings ମନେ ରଖିବାକୁ। Security Cookies: security purposes ପାଇଁ। Advertising Cookies: ଆପଣଙ୍କ ରୁଚି ସହ ସମ୍ବନ୍ଧିତ advertisement ଦେଖାଇବାକୁ।

entries.source: We went outside our planet. However, the most rapid and significant advancement was in communication and technology which has connected a global population of over 3 billion people.
entries.value: ଆମେ went outside ଆମ planet. However, the most rapid ଓ significant advancement was ରେ ଯୋଗାଯୋଗ ଓ technology କେଉଁ has connected a global population of over 3 billion people.

entries.source: We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. We will retain and use your Personal Data to the extent necessary to comply with our legal obligations (for example, if we are required to retain your data to comply with applicable laws), resolve disputes, and enforce our legal agreements and policies. entries.source: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you (“Personal Data”). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to: Email address of Student and Parent First name and last name of Student and Parent Phone number of Student and Parent Address, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City School name Class Cookies and Usage Data We may use your Data to contact you with newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information that may interest you. You may opt-out of receiving any, or all, of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link. Usage Data, We may also collect information that your browser sends whenever you visit our Service or when you access Service by or through any device (“Usage Data”). This Usage Data may include information such as your computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data. When you access Service with a device, this Usage Data may include information such as the type of device you use, your device unique ID, the IP address of your device, your device operating system, the type of Internet browser you use, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.

entries.source: World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: ବିଶ୍ୱ ଇତିହାସକୁ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ଯୁଗରେ ଏକ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନଶୀଳ ଚିତ୍ରରୁ ଧୀରେ ଧୀରେ ଜୁମ୍ ଆଉଟ୍ କରିବା ପରି ଭାବିପାରିବା। 19ଶ ଶତାବ୍ଦୀ ପୂର୍ବର କିଛି ଶତାବ୍ଦୀ ମାନବ ଇତିହାସରେ ଏକ ମୋଡ଼ ଆଣିଥିଲା, କାରଣ ବିଶ୍ୱ ଏକ ସୀମିତ ଓ ସରଳ ଦୃଷ୍ଟିଭଙ୍ଗୀରୁ ନୂତନ ଭୂଭାଗ ଓ ଉପନିବେଶ ବିଷୟରେ ବଢ଼ୁଥିବା ବୁଝାମଣାକୁ ଯାଇଥିଲା। French Revolution ପ୍ରଥମଥର ପାଇଁ ବଡ଼ ଜନସମୁଦାୟ ସ୍ୱାଧୀନତା, ସମତା ଓ ଭ୍ରାତୃତ୍ୱର ଆଦର୍ଶ ସ୍ଥାପନ ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରତିବାଦରେ ଏକତ୍ର ହୋଇଥିବା ମୁହୂର୍ତ୍ତ ହେଲା। World War II ର ଘଟଣାମାନେ ମଧ୍ୟ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ଶତାବ୍ଦୀର ବିଶ୍ୱକୁ ଗଢ଼ିଥିଲେ ଏବଂ 21ଶ ଶତାବ୍ଦୀର ଭିତି ରଚିଥିଲେ।
